summary: Full e2e testing of NumDocMan app (backend + frontend). 28/30 backend tests passed. All major UI flows verified. One bug found and fixed in DocumentsPage.jsx (empty doc_type_id causing FK violation).

minor.issue: Endpoint does not exist (404) - AdminPage frontend may not call this, but the endpoint is missing from admin router
Wrong URL in test - actual endpoint is /api/storage?org_id=<id> (requires org_id query param)

ui_bugs.issue: doc_type_id was sent as empty string '' instead of null when no type selected, causing FK violation (IntegrityError). FIXED: Added '|| null' conversion in handleCreate.

integration_issues.issue: The doc_type_id and phase selects in the create document modal do not have data-testid attributes, making automated testing difficult

issues: KPI cards render correctly with all 3 KPIs (Total Documents, Total Projects, Signatures) - no design issues observed
Logout button text changes with language (shows Déconnexion in FR) - correct behavior but FR users won't find 'Logout' text

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to doc_type_id and phase selects in Create Document modal in DocumentsPage.jsx for better testability
Consider adding /api/admin/stats endpoint if admin dashboard stats are needed
The fix for doc_type_id empty string → null is applied in DocumentsPage.jsx line 84
critical_code_review_comments: DocumentsPage.jsx: Fixed - doc_type_id sent as '' (empty string) instead of null when no type selected causing PostgreSQL FK violation

projects.py _check_org_member: Superadmin is NOT bypassed in org member check - if a superadmin is not a member of org, they get 403 on /api/organizations/{org_id}. However list_orgs returns all orgs for superadmin. Inconsistency.

projects.py _check_project_member: Same issue - superadmin must be added as project member to access project details. But list_projects works for superadmin. Inconsistency that could cause 403 for superadmin accessing specific project.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Organization Alpha (TESTALPHA), TEST_UI Project (UIPROJ) with phases DES/DEV/TEST, document type Plan/PLA, document RCG_UIPROJ_DES_DOC_00001. All cleaned up via pytest cleanup tests except UI test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_numdocman.py. App uses JWT auth (admin@numdocman.com / Admin123!). PostgreSQL DB. All major flows tested: login, org/project CRUD, document lifecycle, workflow transitions, signatures, history, admin, settings. One bug fixed: empty doc_type_id causing FK violation. Superadmin bypass inconsistency in project/org member checks may cause 403 for specific GET operations even for superadmin.
rca_of_issue: The document create FK violation: In DocumentsPage.jsx createForm state initializes doc_type_id as empty string ''. When submitted without selecting a type, the API receives doc_type_id='' which PostgreSQL tries to use as FK reference to document_types table, causing IntegrityError. Fix: send null instead of empty string.
